description_long: This is a large, stately house with a complex, multi-faceted facade and a dark, hipped roof. The front features a prominent central entryway with a decorative arch, flanked by tall windows and symmetrical columns, giving it a grand appearance. The exterior walls are clad in dark brick or stone with contrasting white trim around the windows and doors, enhancing its elegant look. Multiple roof sections and dormers add architectural interest, while the rear and side elevations reveal a spacious layout with numerous windows and a large attached garage. The house appears to have two full stories, with a consistent window arrangement and several bay window projections. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Neo-Georgian architectural styles, emphasizing symmetry and classical details.
description: A grand, two-story house with a dark hipped roof, symmetrical facade, and elegant white-trimmed windows. Features include a prominent entryway, bay windows, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entryway with an arched doorway, symmetrical columns, and a series of tall windows, highlighting the house's formal facade.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the depth of the house, the attached garage, and the complex roof structure with multiple hips and dormers.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long, continuous wall with evenly spaced windows and a large bay window projection, as well as the garage extension.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the angular rooflines, bay window, and the overall width of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched entry with decorative columns, steps, and white trim
